description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized nivolumab as a monotherapy for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with muscle invasive urothelial carcinoma (MIUC) with tumor cell PD-L1 expression >= 1%, who are at high risk of recurrence after undergoing radical resection of MIUC.
